notes:
v0.3.1 — in-app guard rail for Claude-backed modes without an Anthropic key.

What this fixes: pre-v0.3.1, if you tried Clean Text, Eloquence, or any of the content modes without an Anthropic API key set, the AI step failed silently and your raw transcript landed at your cursor with no explanation. People (rightly) thought Voquence was broken.

Now when you trigger a Claude-backed mode without a key, Voquence pops up a friendly screen explaining what's needed and gives you three clear paths: (1) Get a free Anthropic key — opens the right page in your browser, (2) Open Settings if you already have one to paste, or (3) Just use Raw Transcript instead. Your voice work isn't lost either way — the raw transcript still pastes at your cursor.

The screen also surfaces the Anthropic $5 new-account credit. That's about 17,000 polishings before you'd ever pay anything, which most users will never hit.

Also in this release:
• Polish to the mode-prompt copy in case the new prompt fires in a state we didn't expect.

No breaking changes. Existing users keep their keys, settings, and current mode.
